patch:
Index: .claude/settings.local.json
===================================================================
--- .claude/settings.local.json	
+++ .claude/settings.local.json	
@@ -1,11 +1,13 @@
 {
   "permissions": {
     "allow": [
       "Bash(npx vite *)",
       "Bash(git add *)",
       "Bash(git commit *)",
       "Bash(git tag *)",
-      "Bash(git push *)"
+      "Bash(git push *)",
+      "Bash(npm run *)",
+      "Bash(npm ls *)"
     ]
   }
 }

Index: src/components/shell/NewResourceButton.tsx =================================================================== --- src/components/shell/NewResourceButton.tsx +++ src/components/shell/NewResourceButton.tsx @@ -1,177 +0,0 @@ -import { Button, Dropdown, message, theme } from 'antd'; -import { DownOutlined } from '@ant-design/icons'; -import { - AppstoreOutlined, - LinkOutlined, - ThunderboltOutlined, - TagsOutlined, - GroupOutlined, - ApartmentOutlined, - FunctionOutlined, - FilterOutlined -} from '@ant-design/icons'; - -export type NewResourceKind = - | 'object_type' - | 'link_type' - | 'action_type' - | 'shared_property' - | 'group' - | 'interface' - | 'function' - | 'value_type'; - -interface Props { - onCreate: (kind: NewResourceKind) => void; -} - -interface Item { - key: NewResourceKind; - icon: React.ReactNode; - title: string; - desc: string; - enabled: boolean; -} - -const ITEMS: Item[] = [ - { - key: 'object_type', - icon: , - title: 'Object type', - desc: 'Map datasets and models to object types', - enabled: true - }, - { - key: 'link_type', - icon: , - title: 'Link type', - desc: 'Create relationships between object types', - enabled: true - }, - { - key: 'action_type', - icon: , - title: 'Action type', - desc: 'Allow users to writeback to their ontology', - enabled: true - }, - { - key: 'shared_property', - icon: , - title: 'Shared property', - desc: 'Create properties that can be shared across object types', - enabled: false - }, - { - key: 'group', - icon: , - title: 'Group', - desc: 'Use groups to create ontology taxonomies', - enabled: false - }, - { - key: 'interface', - icon: , - title: 'Interface', - desc: 'Use interfaces to build against abstract types', - enabled: false - }, - { - key: 'function', - icon: , - title: 'Function', - desc: 'Define object modifications in code', - enabled: false - }, - { - key: 'value_type', - icon: , - title: 'Value type', - desc: 'Define constraints that can be applied to property values', - enabled: false - } -]; - -export function NewResourceButton({ onCreate }: Props) { - const { token } = theme.useToken(); - - const handleClick = (it: Item) => { - if (!it.enabled) { - message.info(`${it.title} —— 功能规划中`); - return; - } - onCreate(it.key); - }; - - return ( - ( -
- {ITEMS.map((it) => ( -
handleClick(it)} - style={{ - display: 'flex', - gap: 10, - padding: '8px 10px', - borderRadius: 4, - cursor: 'pointer', - opacity: it.enabled ? 1 : 0.5 - }} - onMouseEnter={(e) => - ((e.currentTarget as HTMLDivElement).style.background = - token.colorFillTertiary) - } - onMouseLeave={(e) => - ((e.currentTarget as HTMLDivElement).style.background = - 'transparent') - } - > - - {it.icon} - -
-
- {it.title} -
-
- {it.desc} -
-
-
- ))} -
- )} - > - - - ); -}
